data.body: 264f held-out validation: 7/7 GREEN (1 test-bug fixed: search-path writes raw local string not accountId - legacy behavior; sentinel-absence is the real assertion). Mutation-confirmed teeth on acli skip. lint clean, full suite running. Implementer flags: /user/search sets is_account_id=True too (satisfies AC4); search_user_by_email w/ alias tuple. 2f13 pre-grounding: builds on 264f resolve_mapping. Design: ensure_identity_for(provider,external_id,display_name,repo_root)->id in identity.py = resolve_mapping first (idempotent, one identity) else mint placeholder (name=display_name, mappings=[{provider,external_id}], placeholder marker); upgrade placeholder in-place keyed on external_id. Wire into inbound reconciler (apply_inbound_records.py) where inbound Jira users encountered.
